Legal Notice

Mandatory information regarding the owner of the RumboMed website.

  1. Home
  2. Legal Notice
Last updated: February 6, 2026

Legal Information & Transparency

In compliance with Article 10 of Law 34/2002, of July 11 (LSSI-CE), the identifying data of the owner is set out below.

1. Owner Information

This website, rumbomed.com, is owned by:

  • Owner: RumboMed
  • NIF/CIF: 44700401Q
  • Address: Alhaurín de la Torre, Málaga, Spain
  • Contact Email: info@rumbomed.com
  • Activity: Boat rental and nautical experiences on the Costa del Sol.

2. Purpose

This website has been created to provide information about boat rental services and nautical experiences in Malaga, Marbella, and Estepona. Access to and use of the website attributes the condition of user and implies acceptance of all conditions included in this Legal Notice.

3. Intellectual and Industrial Property

RumboMed owns all intellectual and industrial property rights of its website, including images, audio, video, and texts. The Rumbomed brand and logos are protected by industrial property laws.

The reproduction, distribution, and public communication of all or part of the contents of this website for commercial purposes is expressly prohibited without prior authorization.

4. Disclaimer

RumboMed is not liable for damages of any nature that may be caused by errors in the content, lack of availability of the portal, or the transmission of viruses, despite having adopted all necessary technological measures.

5. Links

In the event that rumbomed.com provides links to third-party sites, RumboMed shall not exercise any control over such sites and their content.

RumboMed Transparency

If you have any technical or legal questions regarding our website or our boat services, please contact us.
